name: Harmonics
descs:
When an ally or an enemy dies in a turn, all units gain 1 [Vulnerable] next turn (once per Wave)
- On ally Clash Win in the same turn where all units gained [Vulnerable] due to the above effect, all allies lose 1 [Vulnerable] and inflict 4 [Laceration] and +2 [Laceration] Count against all enemies (once per turn)

When an ally or an enemy dies in a turn, all units gain 2 [Vulnerable] next turn (once per Wave)
- On ally Clash Win in the same turn where all units gained [Vulnerable] due to the above effect, all allies lose 1 [Vulnerable] and inflict 4 [Laceration] and +2 [Laceration] Count against all enemies (2 times per turn)

When an ally or an enemy dies in a turn, all units gain 3 [Vulnerable] next turn (once per Wave)
- On ally Clash Win in the same turn where all units gained [Vulnerable] due to the above effect, all allies lose 1 [Vulnerable] and inflict 4 [Laceration] and +2 [Laceration] Count against all enemies (3 times per turn)
